wins.event: FY 2024 revenue $51.6B (+44% YoY); operating profit +42%; $22B returned to shareholders (+45% YoY)
FY AI revenue $12.2B (+220% YoY); 41% of semi; Q4 AI $3.7B (+150% YoY)
Long-range guidance: 2027 AI SAM $60-90B (vs $12.2B in 2024) — massive multi-year ramp
VMware operating margin reached 70% exiting 2024 (vs <30% pre-deal); 4,500 VCF customers signed
2 additional hyperscaler XPU customers in advanced development; could expand SAM further

risks.event: Multi-year ramp will not be linear — quarterly variability flagged explicitly
Non-AI semi declined 23% YoY in Q4 to $4.5B; cyclical bottom called but recovery only mid-single-digit
Industrial -27% YoY; recovery only in H2 2025
Customer concentration: 3 main hyperscaler XPU customers driving the $60-90B SAM

guidance.notes: Q1 2025 guide $14.6B (+22% YoY); 2027 AI SAM articulated at $60-90B (5-7x current). New segment reporting: AI vs non-AI. EBITDA target 66%.

_notes: Pivotal call. CEO articulates $60-90B AI SAM by 2027 vs $12B today. New AI/non-AI segment reporting. VMware margin transformation completed ahead of schedule.
